workflow: ЁЯТб Start complex tasks in plan mode before writing any code.
ЁЯТб Use `/rewind` (`Esc Esc`) to undo off-track runs instead of correcting in-context.
ЁЯТб Commit at least once per hour; stale work is lost work.
ЁЯТб After two failed corrections, `/clear` and write a better prompt.
ЁЯТб `/compact` Focus on X тАФ preserves only relevant context during compaction.
ЁЯТб `/btw` for quick questions тАФ answer never enters conversation history.
ЁЯТб Start a fresh session per task тАФ long sessions degrade quality measurably.
ЁЯТб Break tasks into '30 min of human coding' chunks max.
ЁЯТб Describe symptoms, not solutions, for bug fixes.
ЁЯТб `Ctrl+G` in Plan Mode opens the plan in your editor before Claude codes.
ЁЯТб Fan out migrations: generate task list, loop `claude -p` 'migrate $file' in bash.
context: ЁЯТб Keep each `CLAUDE.md` under 200 lines; split overflow into `.claude/rules/` files.
ЁЯТб Run `/compact` manually at ~50% context тАФ never wait for auto-compaction.
ЁЯТб Context rot starts at 50-60% of the nominal maximum, not at the hard limit.
ЁЯТб `CLAUDE.md` survives `/compact` тАФ instructions given only in chat do not.
ЁЯТб Use @path imports for persistent context that survives `/clear`.
ЁЯТб ASCII architecture diagrams in context improve spatial reasoning over prose.
ЁЯТб Every line in `CLAUDE.md` must earn its place: would the agent fail without it?
ЁЯТб todo.md / plan.md survive `/compact` тАФ use as attention anchors in long sessions.
ЁЯТб `.claudeignore` excludes build artifacts; cuts irrelevant context from reads.
ЁЯТб MCP servers load tool definitions upfront тАФ fewer tools = lower baseline token cost.
ЁЯТб Path-scoped rules in `.claude/rules/` load only when matching files are opened.
agents: ЁЯТб Pass file paths to agents, not content тАФ they read files themselves.
ЁЯТб Subagents run in isolated context тАФ delegate exploration to keep main ctx clean.
ЁЯТб Feature-specific agents with scoped skills beat general-purpose roles.
ЁЯТб Subagents cannot spawn subagents тАФ chain them from the main conversation.
ЁЯТб Set `memory: project` in agent frontmatter for cross-session knowledge.
ЁЯТб Use `isolation: worktree` to give a subagent an isolated git copy of the repo.
ЁЯТб Don't spawn a subagent for grep within 2-3 known files тАФ direct Read is faster.
ЁЯТб Supervise closely: auth, payment, security, data mutations (1.5-2x more AI bugs).
ЁЯТб Agents self-report 73% success at 35% actual тАФ always verify with tools.
ЁЯТб Different agent reviews than writes тАФ self-review degrades quality.
ЁЯТб 3 agent failures тЖТ stop and escalate. Hard caps prevent infinite loops.
ЁЯТб Fan-out agents need non-overlapping scopes or they duplicate work.
ЁЯТб Gate each pipeline step тАФ errors propagate without verification gates.
ЁЯТб Same agent wrote tests + code? Separate them тАФ that's why tests lie.
ЁЯТб Adversarial pattern: defender тАЦ attacker тЖТ judge for design decisions.
ЁЯТб Restrict agent tools to scope: Read-only for research, Write for code.
hooks: ЁЯТб `exit 2` from a hook feeds stderr back to Claude as context тАФ use for corrections.
ЁЯТб PreToolUse can modify tool input (e.g., sanitize a command) before execution.
ЁЯТб `statusMessage` field shows custom spinner text while a hook runs.
ЁЯТб `spinnerTipsOverride` in `settings.json` replaces default tips with your own.
ЁЯТб `async: true` on a hook runs it in background without blocking the session.
ЁЯТб `once: true` (skills only) runs a hook once per session then removes it.
ЁЯТб Keep sync hooks under 1 second; anything longer should be async.
ЁЯТб PostToolUse on `Write|Edit` can auto-run code formatter тАФ more reliable than `CLAUDE.md`.
ЁЯТб Stop hook can block Claude from completing until tests pass.
quality: ЁЯТб Share screenshots of visual bugs тАФ Claude groks images faster than prose.
ЁЯТб Tests, screenshots, or expected outputs are the single highest-leverage addition.
ЁЯТб Use 'ultrathink' for hard problems тАФ surfaces chain-of-thought reasoning.
ЁЯТб Use a second session as reviewer тАФ fresh context catches bias in code just written.
ЁЯТб Challenge work: ask Claude to prove the solution works with tests.
ЁЯТб Reference specific files + patterns: 'Follow Widget.cs as the template.'
ЁЯТб Ask Claude to write tests first тАФ exposes gaps before implementation.
ЁЯТб Explain-back: ask Claude to walk through its own code step-by-step.
ЁЯТб Vague prompts are valid for exploration; precise prompts are for execution.
ЁЯТб Review specs, not code тАФ human leverage is defining WHAT, not HOW.
ЁЯТб Examples teach agents format better than rules тАФ show, don't prescribe.
ЁЯТб Start CLAUDE.md empty; add rules only after observed agent failures.
ЁЯТб One noisy CLAUDE.md line tanks accuracy тАФ 'just in case' = poison.
performance: ЁЯТб Heavy reasoning ('ultrathink') is expensive тАФ reserve for architecture decisions.
ЁЯТб Use `/model` to downgrade for simple mechanical tasks тАФ save tokens.
ЁЯТб 50k-token overhead per `--print` call; prefer SDK for tight loops.
ЁЯТб Parallel worktrees + agents cut wall-clock time on multi-file refactors.
ЁЯТб Organize skills in subfolders тАФ flat dirs cause context bloat.
ЁЯТб `effortLevel`: low in `settings.json` reduces token cost for routine tasks.
ЁЯТб autoUpdatesChannel: stable skips buggy releases (one week lag).
ЁЯТб Git worktrees enable parallel branch work without context confusion.
ЁЯТб Avoid MCP servers that mirror entire APIs тАФ prefer few high-level tools.
